headline: Dow Stock Is Down After Earnings. The Outlook Is Improving.
summary: The chemicals company reported a first-quarter per-share loss of 14 cents from sales of $9.8 billion. Wall Street was looking for a 29-cent loss from sales of $9.7 billion.

headline: Dow (DOW) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: James R. Fitterling and Karen S. Carter will start with a summary of our first quarter performance, including details on each of our three operating segments.  Karen S. Carter will then provide an update on current industry dynamics, including how global supply disruptions are influencing market conditions.  Following the prepared remarks, we will open the call for Q&A. I will now turn the call over to James R. Fitterling.
